title: Pecked the chip once and the chip pecked back 😳 #chickens #chickencoop #sora
description: Pecked the chip once and the chip pecked back 😳 #chickens #chickencoop #sora
prompt_text: A humorous outdoor scene set in a chicken coop. A light-brown Orpington-style hen stands behind a small, open black box labeled 'Paqui One Chip Challenge'. Inside the box lies a single, dark purple tortilla chip heavily dusted with red spice. The setting includes dry hay on the ground and a wooden fence/wire mesh enclosure in the background, under bright, natural daylight. The video focuses on the hen's comedic reaction to eating the spicy chip.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A humorous outdoor scene set in a chicken coop. A light-brown Orpington-style hen stands behind a small, open black box labeled 'Paqui One Chip Challenge'. Inside the box lies a single, dark purple tortilla chip heavily dusted with red spice. The setting includes dry hay on the ground and a wooden fence/wire mesh enclosure in the background, under bright, natural daylight. The video focuses on the hen's comedic reaction to eating the spicy chip.

cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle, close-up shot that remains static, focusing on the hen and the product box in the foreground.

actions: The hen repeatedly pecks at the spicy chip inside the box.
Small pieces of the chip break off as the hen eats them.
The hen suddenly stands tall, stretches its neck, and opens its beak wide.
A dubbed-over sound effect of a human screaming is synced with the hen opening its beak to simulate a reaction to the heat.
The hen repeats the screaming pose multiple times for comedic effect.
dialogue: [Sound of rapid pecking against the box and chip]
[High-pitched, distorted human scream sound effect repeated several times]
[Ambient sounds of a backyard or farm]
